name: Atlas Yard Capital
desc: A confident, institutional identity system built to carry an investment brand across stationery, digital, and investor-facing materials. The mark and typeface system were designed to communicate stability and authority while remaining flexible for evolving asset classes.
brief: A confident, institutional identity system built to carry an investment brand across stationery, digital, and investor-facing materials. The mark and typeface system were designed to communicate stability and authority while remaining flexible for evolving asset classes.
overview: A confident, institutional identity system built to carry an investment brand across stationery, digital, and investor-facing materials. The mark and typeface system were designed to communicate stability and authority while remaining flexible for evolving asset classes.
focus: Institutional credibility, authority, scalability across professional materials.
